/usr/bin/ar qc libindicator-sound-service-lib.a "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/notification.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/info-notification.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/warn-notification.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/service.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/options.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/options-gsettings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/volume-control.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/accounts-service-access.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/volume-control-pulse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/volume-warning.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/volume-warning-pulse.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player-mpris.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player-user.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player-list.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player-list-mpris.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/media-player-list-greeter.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/mpris2-interfaces.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/freedesktop-interfaces.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/sound-menu.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/accounts-service-user.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/accounts-service-sound-settings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/accounts-service-privacy-settings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/accounts-service-system-sound-settings.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/greeter-broadcast.c.o" "CMakeFiles/indicator-sound-service-lib.dir/bus-watch-namespace.c.o"
/usr/bin/ranlib libindicator-sound-service-lib.a
